_comment: Init-match diagnostic for the CURRENT libero_wm (this task = episodes 700-749, base=700). No rollout_episode_indices / test_episode_indices on purpose: the rollout falls back to [base + i for i in range(num_trials_per_task)] = 700..749, i.e. demo_0..demo_49 of the HDF5. Use with --init-from-hdf5-root so each episode starts from that demo's own t=0 sim state.

records.task: KITCHEN_SCENE2: put the middle black bowl on the plate
